---
title: "First stage event study using number of establishments in adjacent markets"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8)
```



### Event study plot

$$
\log{N_{m,t}} = \beta_{-1} \log{N^{adj}_{m,t+1}} + \beta_0 \log{N^{adj}_{m,t}} + \beta_1 \log{N^{adj}_{m,t-1}} + x_{m,t}'\gamma + \epsilon_{m,t}
$$

- $N^{adj}_{m,t}$: Number of establishments in adjacent markets
- $x_{m,t}$: Log of labor force in each age category, log of number of firms in each industry


```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/competition_regression/event_study_first_stage.png"))
```
